Home.metaDesc: Auto body and paint shop in Uvita, Costa Ballena. Collision repair, full resprays, touch-ups, and a written warranty. Quote on WhatsApp or via the form.

Hero.label: Uvita Body Shop — Puntarenas, Costa Rica
Hero.sub: Collision repair, full resprays, and custom finishes. Every vehicle leaves our booth like new — or better.

Craft.body: Nine years of hands-on experience. A controlled paint booth with infrared cure. Professional materials from Roberlo, BESA, 3M, and VICCO. Every job backed by a written warranty — because we don't cut corners.
Craft.imageAlt: Fabricio Ríos Ortíz — owner of Uvita Body Shop spraying a panel with professional equipment

services.title: Frame repair
services.subtitle: Chassis & structure
services.description: From light hits to full structural damage. Computerized measuring and hydraulic correction to restore factory geometry.
services.alt: Technician performing chassis straightening and collision repair

services.title: Full respray
services.subtitle: Booth & IR oven
services.description: Stage-built application in our dust-controlled booth with infrared cure. Primer, base, color, and clear — a flawless finish.
services.alt: Masked vehicle prepared for a full respray in a professional booth

services.title: Paint touch-ups
services.subtitle: Scratches & color match
services.description: Invisible spot repairs, scratch removal, and color blending. We match your factory finish so precisely you won’t see where we worked.
services.alt: Technician masking a panel with tape before a paint touch-up

services.title: Dent & impact repair
services.subtitle: Dents & impacts
services.description: Advanced techniques to remove dents and impact damage. We return panels to original shape without unnecessary replacements.
services.alt: Technician repairing a dent on a vehicle panel

services.title: Accessories
services.subtitle: Install & matched paint
services.description: Bumpers, spoilers, side steps, and aftermarket add-ons. Professional installation with paint matched to the body.
services.alt: Professional accessory installation and custom finish on a vehicle

Booth.body: Professional materials from Roberlo, BESA, 3M, and VICCO. Infrared cure oven. Controlled paint environment. Every job with a written warranty — because we don't cut corners.
Booth.imageAlt: Uvita Body Shop technician spraying a vehicle with an HVLP gun in the controlled booth

Materials.body: We only use what factory paint shops use worldwide. No shortcuts. No generic brands. Durability, accurate color, and a finish built to last.

trust.label: Booth + oven
trust.desc: Controlled environment with infrared cure for factory-level results.

trust.label: Written warranty
trust.desc: Every job includes a written warranty. Not perfect? We make it perfect.

trust.label: Any vehicle
trust.desc: Any make and model — sedans, pickups, SUVs. No exceptions.

processSteps.title: Assess
processSteps.description: Full damage review with photo documentation. Transparent quoting — no surprises.

processSteps.title: Repair
processSteps.description: Structural and body work with professional materials from Roberlo, BESA, 3M, and VICCO.

processSteps.title: Paint
processSteps.description: Multi-layer application in the booth with infrared cure. Dust-free, exact color.

processSteps.title: Deliver
processSteps.description: Final quality inspection. Every angle, every surface. We don't release the vehicle until it’s immaculate.

Guarantee.body: Every repair includes our written warranty. We use professional materials, precision tools, and nine years of experience to deliver a factory-looking finish — or better. If you’re not satisfied, we fix it.

Cta.body: Free estimates. Call, message on WhatsApp, or complete the form. We respond within 24 hours.
